sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 55

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 55:1
items.html:
(to the question) Tipa [drop]
For he extends from the Mochin only in the secret of the momentary Zivug [coupling], and immediately stops it, giving only enough for the reception of the Nukva [female]; and the Nukva goes on enlarging that drop with her illuminations. And since the Yesod does not continue extending with his illuminations, his illumination is discerned as being in the secret of a drop. (p. 756, Item 35)
